result.stdout:
Usage: uecli <Command>

Commands:
  add bpfl           Add a function library to current module, if one does not exist.
  add class          Add new class to current module.
  add dataasset      Add a data asset class with given name.
  add interface      Add new interface to current module.
  add module         Add new module to current project or plugin.
  add plugin         Create and add new plugin to current project.
  add project        Create new project.
  add tablerow       Add a data table row struct with given name.
  build              Build project.
  clean              Clean project and plugins from build files.
  code               Open Source Code Editor for current project.
  config get         Get value from config file.
  config set         Set value in config file.
  convert            Convert copied clipboard data to json file.
  cook               Cook project with cook settings.
  create_config      Create new or update old template config in current project or module.
  diff               Launch UE4 diff tool to diff two files.
  editor             Open Unreal Engine Editor and open current project if run inside project folder.
  fix all            Fix all possible errors.
  fix dll_load       Fix `Failed to load dll` errors.
  fix pch_cleanup    Cleanup PCH file errors.
  generate           Generate Source Code Solution for current project.
  get_ue_root        Get UE root of associated UE build.
  help               Display help.
  init               Initialize working environment, create Libraries.sln.
  log build          Open build log file.
  log project        Open project log folder.
  merge              Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.
  merge_lfs          Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.
  run                Run commandlet.
  uuid list          List registered Unreal Engine uuid identifiers.
  uuid set           Set project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.
  uuid show          Show project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.
  version            Display version.

commands.payload:
Usage: uecli <Command>

Commands:
  add bpfl           Add a function library to current module, if one does not exist.
  add class          Add new class to current module.
  add dataasset      Add a data asset class with given name.
  add interface      Add new interface to current module.
  add module         Add new module to current project or plugin.
  add plugin         Create and add new plugin to current project.
  add project        Create new project.
  add tablerow       Add a data table row struct with given name.
  build              Build project.
  clean              Clean project and plugins from build files.
  code               Open Source Code Editor for current project.
  config get         Get value from config file.
  config set         Set value in config file.
  convert            Convert copied clipboard data to json file.
  cook               Cook project with cook settings.
  create_config      Create new or update old template config in current project or module.
  diff               Launch UE4 diff tool to diff two files.
  editor             Open Unreal Engine Editor and open current project if run inside project folder.
  fix all            Fix all possible errors.
  fix dll_load       Fix `Failed to load dll` errors.
  fix pch_cleanup    Cleanup PCH file errors.
  generate           Generate Source Code Solution for current project.
  get_ue_root        Get UE root of associated UE build.
  help               Display help.
  init               Initialize working environment, create Libraries.sln.
  log build          Open build log file.
  log project        Open project log folder.
  merge              Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.
  merge_lfs          Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.
  run                Run commandlet.
  uuid list          List registered Unreal Engine uuid identifiers.
  uuid set           Set project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.
  uuid show          Show project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.
  version            Display version.

result.stdout:
Usage: diff <Left file> <Right file> [options...]

Launch UE4 diff tool to diff two files.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>    Left file
  [1] <String>    Right file

Options:
  -plastic-source <String>         Optional @sourcesymbolic parameter from Plastic SCM diff to help find project folder when making diff. (Default: null)
  -plastic-destination <String>    Optional @destinationsymbolic parameter from Plastic SCM diff to help find project folder when making diff. (Default: null)
